caption: A high-angle shot captures a wide, multi-lane highway bridge bustling with traffic in an urban setting. In the background, a cityscape features a mix of classic European-style architecture and modern skyscrapers under a cloudy, overcast sky. Numerous cars are blurred by motion as they drive across the bridge. As the sequence progresses, white text overlays appear centrally on the screen. Initially, the text reads "IT CAN SEEM IMPOSSIBLE". In the subsequent scene, the text expands to "IT CAN SEEM IMPOSSIBLE TO KEEP UP", and finally, it completes the phrase as "IT CAN SEEM IMPOSSIBLE TO KEEP UP WITH ALL OF THE". The camera remains static, while the flow of traffic continues and the text progressively builds on the screen.
